pr_title: fix(core): resolve ACP Operation Aborted Errors in grep_search
prompt: The grep_search tool in Gemini CLI is throwing 'ACP Operation Aborted' errors when running ripgrep searches. The issue appears to be in how the tool handles the ripgrep subprocess - when the operation is cancelled or times out, the error is not being caught gracefully and propagates as an unhandled exception. Fix the grep tool implementation in packages/core/src/tools/grep.ts and the underlying ripgrep wrapper in packages/core/src/tools/ripGrep.ts to properly handle abort signals and operation cancellation. Add tests verifying the fix in grep.test.ts.
